title: I've fallen in love with high-res music streaming service Qobuz since quitting Spotify for it last year — and now it's had a big update that fixes some of its key flaws
summary: While Qobuz is without question the best music streamer if you care more about audio quality than anything else (and are you really a music lover if you don't?), it has traditionally lagged behind the likes of Spotify when it comes to…
